steps.name: Launch WeChat DevTools automation session
steps.detail: WeChat DevTools service port is disabled. Open WeChat DevTools > Settings > Security Settings, enable Service Port, then rerun npm run bot:e2e-3.0 -- --fresh-devtools. Detected config: C:\Users\admin\AppData\Local\微信开发者工具\User Data\80d774828fc67c7dafc59cd74ce70db0\WeappLocalData\localstorage_b72da75d79277d2f5f9c30c9177be57e.json
